title: codereview-pass2 LR1110.cs IRQ: DIO9/IRQ naming, remaining thread safety gaps, ClearIrq state transition
description: Pass 2 review of IRQ handler chunk after edits: 1. DIO9 should be renamed IRQ for Renode pattern match with SX1262 (P3). 2. WaitForRxResponse still blocks SPI (P1 from goxo bead). 3. No stateLock in new latch/clear paths (P2). 4. TriggerTx and RX set latchedIrqFlags missing in some paths (P2). 5. P4: add comment referencing T1000-E pinout P0.12=CS, P1.10=RESET, gpio1.1=DIO9. All P3/P4 fixed as mandatory. No dead code added. Filed as codereview.
